title: (HIGH-RISK, gated) sourced research-context explainer
context: This optional explanatory track is HIGH-RISK and gated: it only opens if the PLAN section 7 track opens, and any patient-facing/research-context text requires credentialed oncologist + patient-advocate sign-off and explicit "not medical advice" framing before merge (PLAN section 7/8). It is NOT part of v1.0. This task produces a sourced, non-advice research-context explainer only - it must never give medical advice, prognosis, eligibility, or treatment guidance, which remain refused. Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Draft a fully-sourced research-context explainer (background, not advice) gated behind oncologist + patient-advocate sign-off, only if the PLAN section 7 high-risk track opens.
acceptanceCriteria: Content is research-context background only, every claim provenance-stamped to an open source; no medical advice, prognosis, eligibility, ranking, or treatment guidance.
Carries an explicit "not medical advice" disclaimer and is gated behind credentialed oncologist + patient-advocate sign-off before merge.
Published only if the PLAN section 7 high-risk track is opened; otherwise remains blocked.
output: output/research-context-explainer.md (sourced, gated, "not medical advice"), only if the section 7 track opens.
